title: Software Update - DFU -  Houston...  Retry button
scenario: Verify that tapping Retry after a DFU failure (triggered by turning off headset at ~10% progress) redirects the user to the previous screen to restart the update process.
steps: Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
Trigger DFU failure by turning off the headset at approximately 10% progress.
expected: User is directed to the previous screen where the update process will attempt again.
